mnemonics: SASF (Sartaj And Susan's Fundamentals): Think of them as the 'SAS' commandos of data structures, 'F'ighting complexity with efficient algorithms.
Data Structures Sorted & Applied: Sahni (known for sorting) and Anderson-Freed (applied data structures) cover the theory and its practical use.
keyPoints: Sartaj Sahni is a renowned computer scientist, co-author of the fundamental textbook 'Data Structures, Algorithms, and Applications in C++'.
Susan Anderson-Freed is a computer science educator, co-author with Sahni on works focusing on the practical application of data structures.
This module likely covers the implementation and real-world application of core data structures (like trees, graphs, hash tables) as presented in their influential work.
commonMistakes: Assuming the topic is about a specific data structure named after them, rather than their foundational textbook and teachings.
Focusing only on the theoretical definitions from the text and neglecting the 'Applications' component, which is crucial for the module.
